texas.intro: Texas has 317 testosterone replacement therapy clinics, with substantial concentrations in Austin, Houston, San Antonio, Fort Worth, Dallas, and El Paso. Major multi-location providers operating throughout the state include Gameday Men's Health, Low T Center, and Renew Vitality. Treatment offerings vary by location and provider.

california.intro: California hosts 338 testosterone replacement therapy clinics, with notable concentrations in Los Angeles, San Diego, Sacramento, Newport Beach, Fresno, and Bakersfield. Major multi-location providers operating across the state include Gameday Men's Health and Renew Vitality. This directory organizes clinics by region to help you identify options in your area.

florida.intro: Florida has 314 testosterone replacement therapy clinics distributed across the state, with notable concentrations in Tampa, Jacksonville, Fort Lauderdale, Miami, Orlando, and St. Petersburg. Major multi-location providers operating throughout Florida include Gameday Men's Health and Renew Vitality. These clinics provide TRT services to patients seeking hormone therapy treatment across the region.

new-york.intro: New York has 137 testosterone replacement therapy clinics operating across the state, with significant concentration in Manhattan, Rochester, Buffalo, Syracuse, Garden City, and Staten Island. Major multi-location providers in the region include Renew Vitality and Gameday Men's Health, offering TRT services to patients throughout New York.

arizona.intro: Arizona has 129 testosterone replacement therapy clinics distributed across the state, with major concentrations in Scottsdale, Phoenix, Tucson, Chandler, Mesa, and Gilbert. Gameday Men's Health and Renew Vitality are among the notable multi-location providers operating statewide. This directory helps patients locate clinics by location and provider.

new-york/manhattan.intro: Manhattan has 42 TRT and hormone therapy clinics offering services including testosterone replacement therapy, peptides, HRT, and wellness treatments. These clinics maintain an average Google rating of 4.7 stars, reflecting consistent patient satisfaction. Whether you're seeking hormone optimization or specialized wellness care, the city's clinics provide varied approaches to treatment.

Services typically include HRT, TRT, and wellness treatments, with an average Google rating of 4.5 stars across the market. Both established healthcare systems and specialized hormone clinics serve the local community.
